title: モヤつく気持ちは自主トレで？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I come across Narita Taishin in the
central plaza.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
choice_data_list: (Did I do something wrong?)
(Did I do something wrong?)

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Taishiiin! Wait up, Taishiiin!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hold on, Ticket. Dry your tears before you go
chasing after her.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: B-but it's my fault Taishin's—waaah!
choice_data_list: What happened?
What happened?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's Taishin's trainer.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
As I'm sure you're aware, there has been more
talk about the three of us online lately.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, the forum that Ticket showed us
had some hate directed at Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Everyone was saying so many nice things about
us. I had no idea that other stuff was there!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah! I'm so sorry, Taishiiin!
choice_data_list: No wonder she left without a word to me...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
She probably didn't know what to say... There
were hateful comments about you as well.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
People were saying how it's your fault for
overworking her and that's why her condition is so
poor.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
There was even mention of how Taishin would be
better off with another trainer who can actually
draw out her potential.
choice_data_list: I see...
I see...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry if I'm overstepping, but could you please
talk with Taishin?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure what she needs right now are some words
of encouragement from you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.
choice_data_list: I heard about the comments online.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ticket and Hayahide told you? Ugh, why are they
literally always sticking their nose in my business?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Look, I'm totally fine. I'm not gonna get stuck in
my own head and do something reckless like
before.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: So you can just forget about what you heard.
choice_data_list: Those comments hurt me.
Those comments hurt me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list: How did you feel when you saw them?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hurt.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I mean, how else am I supposed to feel?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
But I've already decided that I'm not gonna do
anything crazy just because I'm mad.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm itching to do some solo training right now...
but I won't.
choice_data_list: Then how about you get some rest instead?
You can as long as you don't overdo it!
You can as long as you don't overdo it!
Nah, train as much as you want!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm itching to do some solo training right now...
but I won't.
choice_data_list: Then how about you get some rest instead?
You can as long as you don't overdo it!
You can as long as you don't overdo it!
Nah, train as much as you want!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Making Narita Taishin train when she's feeling
down isn't going to do us any good.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I decide to cancel training for today.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What's this?
choice_data_list: Hot chocolate. It'll help you calm down.
Hot chocolate. It'll help you calm down.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Thanks, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, Narita Taishin and I take some time to
just relax.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some moderate training should help Narita
Taishin improve.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I tell her it's probably worse for her health
to bottle up her stress, she agrees.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Okay.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'll keep myself in check and be careful not to
overdo it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The results of her solo training are good.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And thanks to that, she's able to better
understand herself now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?! Were you even listening to me?
choice_data_list:
You'll be fine! You've got me watching over
you!

You'll be fine! You've got me watching over
you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well... If you say so.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After training...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Phew...
choice_data_list: Looks like you're feeling better.
Looks like you're feeling better.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. There's nothing like a good run to clear the
mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Watching Narita Taishin run without worry puts
me in a better mood too.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
choice_data_list: What's wrong?
What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Nothing. I'm gonna run another lap.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(I feel better now that I've run a few laps, but I
don't think Trainer does...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Come to think of it, why not blame me for
getting caught in the crossfire? It's my fault those
nasty comments even exist!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (Ugh, dammit! I can't concentrate at all!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin is unable to shed her frustration,
and she remains just as stressed as ever.
